category_sources: source_facts.description says it visualizes dependencies between files and enforces dependency rules.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dep-tree; source_facts.homepage is the official dep-tree repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies dependency visualization and dependency rule enforcement; source_facts.executables lists dep-tree.
